prompt: Create a classic newspaper front page about a city opening a major new railway line. Make it feel like a respected daily paper with a centered masthead, formal headline hierarchy, a traditional broadsheet structure, balanced editorial columns, section labels, and a moderate news photo.
Create a traditional broadsheet newspaper front page about a national election result with formal hierarchy, balanced columns, classic editorial packaging, and a serious front-page newspaper feel.

Create a metro newspaper grid front page about a city transit expansion with a modular modern newspaper layout. Make it feel like a fast city-desk product with news cards, brief panels, commuter updates, a modern metro masthead, a modular editorial grid, and a clean transit-news identity.
Create a modern city metro newspaper layout about service disruptions with modular briefing cards, commuter notes, update blocks, metro-desk packaging, and a fast newsroom grid.

Create a magazine-style newspaper cover story about a celebrity interview with a dominant cover image and editorial cover feel. Make it feel like a premium weekend review with bold cover packaging, teaser lines, a large cover headline, feature-led publication styling, and a polished cover-story identity.

Create a weekend review newspaper cover story about a major film star with a dominant cover image, editorial teaser packaging, premium magazine-like presentation, and a feature-cover publication feel.

Create a minimal newspaper briefing layout about market updates with a clean ledger-style newspaper design. Make it feel like a disciplined morning briefing with restrained typography, compact note panels, briefing cards, financial-desk structure, and a quiet market-report identity.

Create a minimal ledger-style newspaper briefing about startup funding news, with the lead story stating that Polar Cut raised 50 million dollars in a new funding round. Make it feel like a disciplined morning financial briefing with restrained typography, compact note panels, briefing cards, financial-desk structure, and a quiet market-report identity.
